title: Machine Learning in Healthcare
description: A comprehensive report analyzing the applications of machine learning in diagnostic imaging, patient outcome prediction, and clinical decision support systems.
content: This report examines how machine learning is transforming healthcare delivery, from early disease detection to personalized treatment plans.
Key areas covered include diagnostic imaging (X-ray, MRI, CT analysis), predictive models for patient readmission, and ethical considerations around data privacy and algorithmic bias.
The analysis draws on peer-reviewed literature and case studies from leading hospitals implementing AI-assisted workflows.

title: Cybersecurity Threat Landscape 2025
description: An in-depth research report covering emerging cyber threats, attack vectors, and recommended mitigation strategies for enterprise environments.
content: This report maps the evolving threat landscape facing organizations in 2025, including ransomware-as-a-service, supply chain attacks, and AI-powered phishing campaigns.
Each threat category includes real-world examples, impact assessments, and practical mitigation strategies aligned with NIST and ISO frameworks.
Intended for security teams and IT leaders planning defense-in-depth strategies for cloud and hybrid environments.

title: Distributed Systems Architecture
description: Technical analysis of microservices, event-driven design, scalability patterns, and trade-offs in modern distributed software systems.
content: This report breaks down how large-scale applications are built using microservices, message queues, and service meshes to handle growth and fault tolerance.
Topics include CAP theorem trade-offs, consistency models, load balancing, caching strategies, and observability with metrics, logs, and tracing.
Intended for engineers designing or migrating systems to cloud-native, distributed architectures.

title: Task Manager App
description: A full-stack task management application with user authentication, drag-and-drop boards, and real-time updates built with React and Node.js.
content: A Kanban-style task manager built with React on the frontend and Node.js/Express on the backend, with MongoDB for data persistence.
Features include user authentication (JWT), drag-and-drop boards, task assignments, due dates, and real-time updates via WebSockets.
The project demonstrates full-stack architecture, REST API design, and responsive UI patterns.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A responsive weather dashboard that fetches live data from a public API, featuring location search, 7-day forecasts, and dark mode.
content: A clean, responsive weather app that pulls live data from the OpenWeatherMap API with geolocation and manual city search.
Displays current conditions, hourly trends, and a 7-day forecast with intuitive icons and temperature charts.
Built with vanilla JavaScript and CSS, featuring a dark/light mode toggle and fully mobile-responsive layout.

title: Portfolio Website
description: This technical portfolio — a static, JSON-driven site for showcasing software projects and tech reports on GitHub Pages.
content: A static technical portfolio where all project data lives in a single JSON file, making updates quick and version-controlled.
Separate sections for tech reports and software projects, with individual detail pages for each entry.
Deployed on GitHub Pages with no build step — HTML, CSS, and JavaScript only.
